ValidationRule.description: Rejection Reason must be set when an Investor Outreach Opportunity is moved to 6. Closed Lost. Captures the reason a fund passed for future round learning.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Investor_Outreach', ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Lost'), ISBLANK(TEXT(Rejection_Reason__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Rejection Reason is required when Stage is 6. Closed Lost.
